title: nodejs:24 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
nodejs
[1:24.11.1-2]
- Disable test-tls-session-cache.js as its not currently compatiable with
  RHEL environment

[1:24.11.1-1]
- Update to version 24.11.1

nodejs-nodemon
[3.0.3-3]
- Keep BR on just npm

[3.0.3-2]
- Fix BR for nodejs-npm

nodejs-packaging
[2021.06-6]
- Properly handle @group/package deps in nodejs-symlink-deps
  Resolves: RHEL-121581

[2021.06-5]
- nodejs.req to properly detect bundled deps
full_text:
nodejs
[1:24.11.1-2]
- Disable test-tls-session-cache.js as its not currently compatiable with
  RHEL environment

[1:24.11.1-1]
- Update to version 24.11.1

nodejs-nodemon
[3.0.3-3]
- Keep BR on just npm

[3.0.3-2]
- Fix BR for nodejs-npm

nodejs-packaging
[2021.06-6]
- Properly handle @group/package deps in nodejs-symlink-deps
  Resolves: RHEL-121581

[2021.06-5]
- nodejs.req to properly detect bundled deps

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELEA-2025-23332.html
